name: showLessonPhase
description: Notify BiteCode that the lesson entered one fixed workflow phase. Send only the phase identifier; BiteCode owns and calculates the phase order, total, and learner-facing label. Call once at the start of a phase and never repeat the same phase.

parameters.description: Fixed phase identifier. Use exactly one of: introduction, previous_lesson_review, calibration, main_lesson, knowledge_check, session_wrap_up.
